post.description:
Accept JSON body with {story: {...}, machine: {...}} and persist to config/.

Returns {ok: true} on success or {ok:false, detail: str} on error.

get.description:
Get all resolved prompts (defaults + global overrides + model overrides).

The response now also includes the list of available languages as
determined by the bundled instructions file, and the values returned
for ``system_messages``/``user_prompts`` are resolved into the active
project's language (falling back to English).

in sync.  It is deliberately separate from the prose suggestion call so
that we can run it in the background on every text change.

post.description:
Stream chat with the configured OpenAI-compatible model.

Body JSON:
  {
    "model_name": "name-of-configured-entry" | null,
    "model_type": "CHAT" | "WRITING" | "EDITING" | null,
    "messages": [{"role": "system|user|assistant", "content": str}, ...],
    // optional overrides (otherwise pulled from runtime user machine config)
    "base_url": str,
    "api_key": str,
    "model": str,
    "timeout_s": int
  }

Returns: Streaming text response with the assistant's message.

post.description:
Search across the active project.

Supported scopes: current_chapter, all_chapters, sourcebook, metadata, all.
Supported modes: literal (default), regex (is_regex=true), phonetic (is_phonetic=true).

Replace every occurrence of a query throughout the active project.

All matching text in the specified scope is substituted with *replacement*.
After completion the frontend should refresh story/chapter state.

Replace a single specifically identified match.

The match is identified by section_type, section_id, field, and match_index
(zero-based ordinal of the match within that field).

ChapterCreate.title: ChapterCreate

ChatInitialStateResponse.title: ChatInitialStateResponse
ChatInitialStateResponse.description:
Response body for ``GET /api/v1/chat``.

Returns the available LLM models and initial (empty) message history so
the frontend can initialise the chat panel without a separate request.

ProjectInfo.title: ProjectInfo
ProjectInfo.description: Describes a single project entry returned by the listing endpoint.

query.title: Query
query.description: Text or pattern to search for

replacement.title: Replacement
replacement.description: Text to substitute in place of each match

ReplaceAllRequest.title: ReplaceAllRequest
ReplaceAllRequest.description: Request to replace all occurrences of a search query.

changed_sections.title: Changed Sections
changed_sections.description: Human-readable labels for each changed section

query.title: Query
query.description: Text or pattern to search for

replacement.title: Replacement
replacement.description: Text to substitute in place of the match

match_index.title: Match Index
match_index.description: Zero-based index of the match within this section+field

ReplaceSingleRequest.title: ReplaceSingleRequest
ReplaceSingleRequest.description: Request to replace one specific match (identified by its ordinal index).

start.title: Start
start.description: Character offset of the start of the match

end.title: End
end.description: Character offset of the end of the match

context_before.title: Context Before
context_before.description: Up to 80 characters before the match

context_after.title: Context After
context_after.description: Up to 80 characters after the match

SearchMatch.title: SearchMatch
SearchMatch.description: A single occurrence of the query in a body of text.

query.title: Query
query.description: Text or pattern to search for

scope.description: Which parts of the project to search

is_regex.title: Is Regex
is_regex.description: Treat query as a regular expression

is_phonetic.title: Is Phonetic
is_phonetic.description: Use phonetic (soundex) matching instead of literal

active_chapter_id.title: Active Chapter Id
active_chapter_id.description: Chapter ID to use when scope is current_chapter

SearchOptions.title: SearchOptions
SearchOptions.description: Parameters controlling what and how to search.

SearchResponse.title: SearchResponse
SearchResponse.description: Top-level response for a search request.

section_type.title: Section Type
section_type.description: One of: chapter_content, chapter_metadata, story_metadata, sourcebook

section_id.title: Section Id
section_id.description: Unique identifier for the section (chapter ID, entry name, …)

field.title: Field
field.description: Which data field contains the match, e.g. 'content', 'summary', 'notes', 'conflicts[0].description'

SearchResultSection.title: SearchResultSection
SearchResultSection.description: All matches found within one logical section of the project.

SearchScope.title: SearchScope
SearchScope.description: The scope of content to search within a project.

SourcebookKeywordsRequest.title: SourcebookKeywordsRequest
SourcebookKeywordsRequest.description: Request payload for generating keywords from an entry description.
